nav.class: navbar navbar-expand-lg navbar-light bg-light border-bottom py-0 px-2 shadow-sm

ul.class: navbar-nav me-auto mb-0 d-flex flex-row align-items-center

div.class: flex-grow-1 border border-secondary bg-white overflow-auto p-0 mb-2

tr.td: Select a model to view designs.

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-secondary rounded-0 py-0 px-2
btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary rounded-0 py-0 px-2

div.class: flex-grow-1 bg-white border d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center overflow-hidden position-relative
d-none text-muted small position-absolute top-50 start-50 translate-middle text-center bg-white p-2 border

ul.class: nav nav-tabs ps-2 bg-light border-bottom border-top

button.class: nav-link active py-1 px-3 rounded-0 border-bottom-0

h6.class: bg-secondary text-white px-2 py-1 small fw-bold mb-3

a.class: btn btn-sm btn-outline-dark rounded-0 py-0 w-100

table.class: table table-bordered table-sm small table-striped mb-0 text-end
table table-sm table-hover small mb-2 table-bordered

t.t-esc: line.stone_id.currency_id.name if line.stone_id and line.stone_id.currency_id else 'US'

table.class: table table-sm table-hover small mb-0 table-bordered

footer.class: fixed-bottom bg-light border-top d-flex align-items-center px-2 shadow-lg

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-light border text-dark fw-bold rounded-0 px-3
btn btn-sm btn-light border text-dark fw-bold rounded-0 px-3
btn btn-sm btn-light border text-dark fw-bold rounded-0 px-3
btn btn-sm btn-light border text-dark fw-bold rounded-0 px-3
btn btn-sm btn-light border text-dark fw-bold rounded-0 px-3
btn btn-sm btn-light border text-dark fw-bold rounded-0 px-3

table.class: table table-sm table-hover small table-bordered mb-0

span.t-esc: product.model_id.code + '-' if product and product.model_id else ''

div.p: Please select information to be copied.

input.name: model_id
input.t-att-value: product.model_id.id if product and product.model_id else ''
